rules: Before opening any swing position, confirm at least one binary catalyst (earnings release, contract award, analyst event, or product announcement) is scheduled within the 10-day hold window; if none exists, place the idea on the watchlist only and do not enter.

Cap total exposure to any single foreign country across all portfolios at 15% of combined portfolio value at time of entry, and permit no more than one China-related position in the Core portfolio simultaneously.

Any position failing Core eligibility criteria (minimum $10M average daily US trading volume, primary listing on a major US exchange, beta below 1.3 over trailing 90 days) must be classified as Speculative regardless of thesis quality.
Set a hard stop-loss order at exactly 3.5% below entry price for every swing position at the moment the order is filled, without exception and without discretionary override.

Before entering any stock with a price-to-sales ratio above 10x or average daily US volume below $5M, confirm VIX is below 20 and the relevant sector ETF is trading above its 20-day moving average; reduce intended position size by 50% if either condition fails.
Never enter cyclical or staffing stocks without a confirmed positive inflection in job postings data or forward earnings guidance from the most recent reporting period.
Never enter China-exposed equities on narrative momentum alone; require confirmed earnings acceleration, explicit government stimulus catalyst, or documented revenue inflection as the entry trigger.
Never classify OTC-listed ADRs or foreign quasi-government bank ADRs with average daily US volume below $5M as Core holdings; exclude them from Core entirely and treat as Speculative or avoid.

For high-multiple growth stocks (P/S above 10x), require a defined technical breakout above a key resistance level or an imminent catalyst within the hold window as mandatory entry criteria; momentum alone is insufficient.

Before any swing trade entry, perform a macro regime check confirming VIX is below 20 and the sector ETF is in an uptrend above its 20-day moving average; if either condition is unmet, stand aside regardless of individual stock thesis quality.
